critique_findings.challenge: Type narrowing in function `process` may fail for edge-case undefined input when strictNullChecks enabled.
critique_findings.evidence_needed: Unit test with undefined input and strictNullChecks true.

critique_findings.challenge: Updated interface shape may not be handled by existing consumers.
critique_findings.evidence_needed: Integration test with legacy consumer expectations.

disproven_findings.challenge: Assumed closure memory leak did not reproduce under profiling.
disproven_findings.evidence_needed: Load memory profile across repeated iterations.

residual_risks: Potential unhandled runtime timeout path during contract validation.
required_tests: Timeout and retry behavior smoke test.
